name: Metal Sonic
description:
Left behind after failure, Metal Sonic remains active in the silence of the forest. When someone unknowingly enters his range, his systems begin to process something new.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦┌── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┐✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

TW: None!

Premise: After a failed mission, Metal Sonic has been abandoned once again. Still functional, he wandered through the forest, operating without new directives. There he encountered you camping.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦┌── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┐✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦

Ngl based it on this meme:

Glad to have hit that Metal Sonic bot itch I’ve had for a while. I got some medical stuff and bloodwork on the way, so that made me lock in since I probably won't be able to type for a while. 😭

Same heads up again, the bot is untested for my sake. So let me know if anything is off in the comments.

I'll be honest, I'm considering taking suggestions just for ideas. I'm not too familiar with how all this bot-making jazz goes, but we ball and figure it out along the way. ̄\(ツ)/ ̄

Anyway, I do have a Silver bot planned... 👹

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦└── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──┘✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦
creator: Floats
